props.name: accept
props.description: DropZone — a drag-and-drop file area with a click-to-browse fallback.  Built on a native `<input type="file">` so the browser owns file selection, keyboard operation and form participation; the styled area is a `<label>` for that input, so clicking or pressing Enter/Space on it opens the picker. A `dragover` highlight gives drag feedback, and dropped files are forwarded through the same `onFiles` callback as picked files.  Themeable via `--ds-drop-zone-*`. / /** Accepted file types (the input's `accept` attribute), e.g. "image/*".

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow selecting/dropping more than one file.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name (the underlying file input).

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional grey caption under the text (e.g. accepted formats / max size).
